title: Pestshield Mosquito and Insect Repellent Wipes Pack of 25
features: KEEP FLYING INSECTS AWAY: Pestshield repellent wipes contains the active ingredient Eucalyptus Citriodora Hydrated; which strongly helps repel mosquitos, insects and biting bugs; keeping your family safe and itch free wherever you are

SAFE FAMILY TRAVELING: Pestshield Repellent Wipes are a great way to keep yourself and family protected from nasty bites; mosquito and Insect repellent is proven to affect an insects senses such as smell and taste, preventing the chance of bites which cause rashes and itches

BIODEGRADABLE: Pestshield Repellent Wipes are not only effective for insect bites but also the environment; our wipes are 100% biodegradable; meaning a reduction in carbon footprints and easily disposable with no harmful toxins
HOW TO USE: Apply as necessary to exposed areas of skin; when applying to face avoid eyes and mouth; length of effectiveness varies depending on things such as activity and level of perspiration
For best results apply and allow to dry before applying sunscreen; renew application every 3-4 hours or as necessary, and after swimming
description: Product Description Pestshield repellent wipes contains the active ingredient Eucalyptus Citriodora Hydrated. Which strongly helps repel mosquitos, insects and biting bugs. Keeping your family safe and itch free wherever you are! Pestshield Repellent Wipes are a great way to keep yourself and family protected from nasty bites. Mosquito & Insect repellent is proven to affect an insects senses such as smell and taste, preventing the chance of bites which cause rashes and itches. Pestshield Repellent Wipes are not only effective for insect bites but also the environment. Our wipes are 100% biodegradable. Meaning a reduction in carbon footprints and easily disposable with no harmful toxins! Apply as necessary to exposed areas of skin. When applying to face avoid eyes and mouth. Length of effectiveness varies depending on things such as activity and level of perspiration. For best results apply and allow to dry before applying sunscreen. Renew application every 3-4 hours or as necessary, and after swimming. Ingredients Aqua, Citrepel, Peg-40, Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Phenoxyethanol, Imidazolidinyl Urea, Xantham Gum. Active Ingredients Eucalyptus Citriodora Hydrated, Cyclized 3.456% v/v, Cymbopogon Winterianus Oil, Fractionated, Hydrated Cyclized 0.2& v/v.
